description:
Migrate all files from the existing AES-encrypted volume (/home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc) to a newly created Twofish-encrypted volume. 

1. Mount the source volume '/home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc' (Password: 'MountMe2024') to slot 1.
2. Create a NEW 25MB encrypted volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/twofish_volume.hc'. Use 'Twofish' encryption algorithm, 'SHA-512' hash, FAT filesystem, and password 'SecureMigration2024!'.
3. Mount the new volume to slot 2.
4. Copy ALL files from the source volume to the new volume.
5. Create a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/migration_manifest.txt' listing the filenames and their sizes in bytes.
6. Dismount BOTH volumes.
